Package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories

Class BookingRepository

java.lang.Object
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
public class BookingRepository extends Object
Static in-memory repository that holds all Booking records for the currently logged-in user. The in-memory map is loaded on login via loadBookingsForUser(String) and kept in sync with the bookings and booking_seats tables for every write.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Booking
    addBooking(String email, String movieId, String showtime, HashSet<String> selectedSeats, int totalPrice)
    Creates a new booking, persists it to the bookings and booking_seats tables in a single transaction, and adds it to the in-memory map.
    static int
    calculateTotalPrice(HashSet<String> selectedSeatId, int ticketPrice)
     
    static void
    cancelBooking(String bookingId)
    Cancels the booking with the given ID: Deletes all booking_seats rows for this booking. Deletes the bookings header row. Removes the cancelled seats from the in-memory Movie.getOccupiedSeat() set so the seat map reflects availability immediately without a full reload. Removes the Booking from the in-memory map. Both DELETE statements run inside a single transaction so the database stays consistent if either fails.
    static LinkedHashMap<String,Booking>
    getBookings()
    Returns the entire in-memory booking map for the current session.

    Loads all booking records for the given user from the database into the in-memory map.
    static ArrayList<Booking>
    searchBooking(String information)
    Searches the in-memory booking store for records matching the given query.

  • Constructor Details

    • BookingRepository

      public BookingRepository()

  • Method Details

    • loadBookingsForUser

      public static void loadBookingsForUser(String userEmail) throws SQLException
      Loads all booking records for the given user from the database into the in-memory map. Each booking's seat list is assembled from the corresponding booking_seats rows. Must be called once at login, replacing the previous BookingCsvIO.getIO().readCsvFile(email) call in LoginUIController.
      Parameters:
      userEmail - the email address of the currently logged-in user
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the database cannot be queried

    • getBookings

      public static LinkedHashMap<String,Booking> getBookings()
      Returns the entire in-memory booking map for the current session.
      Returns:
      a LinkedHashMap mapping booking ID → Booking

    • addBooking

      public static Booking addBooking(String email, String movieId, String showtime, HashSet<String> selectedSeats, int totalPrice) throws SQLException
      Creates a new booking, persists it to the bookings and booking_seats tables in a single transaction, and adds it to the in-memory map. Also updates the in-memory Movie record so that the chosen seats are immediately reflected as occupied.
      Parameters:
      email - the email address of the user making the booking
      movieId - the ID of the movie being booked
      showtime - the showtime string in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format
      selectedSeats - the set of seat IDs chosen by the user
      totalPrice - the total price for all selected seats
      Returns:
      the newly created and persisted Booking instance
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the database INSERT fails

    • searchBooking

      public static ArrayList<Booking> searchBooking(String information)
      Searches the in-memory booking store for records matching the given query. If the query exactly matches a booking ID, that single booking is returned. Otherwise, all bookings whose associated movie title, showtime string, or total price string match the query are returned.
      Parameters:
      information - the search query string
      Returns:
      an ArrayList of matching Booking objects; empty if no matches are found

    • cancelBooking

      public static void cancelBooking(String bookingId) throws SQLException
      Cancels the booking with the given ID:
      1. Deletes all booking_seats rows for this booking.
      2. Deletes the bookings header row.
      3. Removes the cancelled seats from the in-memory Movie.getOccupiedSeat() set so the seat map reflects availability immediately without a full reload.
      4. Removes the Booking from the in-memory map.
      Both DELETE statements run inside a single transaction so the database stays consistent if either fails.
      Parameters:
      bookingId - the UUID string of the booking to cancel
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the database DELETEs fail

    • calculateTotalPrice

      public static int calculateTotalPrice(HashSet<String> selectedSeatId, int ticketPrice)
